title: helichrysum lepidissimum
intro: Helichrysum lepidissimum is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, known for its bright yellow flowers and ability to retain its shape and color even after drying. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it useful for wound healing and reducing swelling. The health benefits of Helichrysum lepidissimum include reducing pain and inflammation, improving circulation, and promoting relaxation, which can be beneficial for conditions such as arthritis and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum lepidissimum include essential oils, tinctures, and dried flowers, which can be used topically or internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
